nasb.text: He who is too impoverished for such an offering Selects a tree that does not rot; He seeks out for himself a skillful craftsman To prepare an idol that will not totter.

esv.text: He who is too impoverished for an offering chooses wood that will not rot; he seeks out a skillful craftsman to set up an idol that will not move.

cnv.text: 貧窮獻不起這供物的， 就揀選不朽壞的樹木， 為自己尋找巧匠， 立起不會動搖的偶像。

ccb.text: 买不起这种偶像的人就选一块耐用的木头， 找个精巧的工匠， 雕出一个可以站立不倒的偶像。

csbs.text: 那穷得供奉不起的人， 就挑选不会朽坏的木头， 为自己寻找巧匠， 立起不会摇动的偶像。
